query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as orphanedOrderCount,
  MIN(createdAt) as oldestOrder,
  MAX(createdAt) as newestOrder
FROM orders 
WHERE userId IS NULL;

  MIN(createdAt) as oldestOrder,
  MAX(createdAt) as newestOrder
